observations.archetype_gloss: Represents the unconscious, repressed aspects of the self, including internal struggles and conflicts
observations.summary: Dan is depicted as struggling with his own breath in sleep, symbolizing an internal, unconscious conflict and a confrontation with his shadow self.

evidence.quote: From within: the low, ragged sound of a man trying to outrun his own breath in sleep. Rough and uneven. Unconscious of itself.
